---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do

<!-- Describe the goal, not the solution. What problem are you
running into that a change would solve? -->

## What would the ideal outcome look like

<!-- Rough sketch of the change from a user's POV. Screenshots or
short story-shaped examples ("I open the editor, upload X, expect
to see Y") help a lot. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- If there are workarounds today, or other approaches you
thought about, list them here. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This is about **authoring** (editor UI, uploads, exports)
- [ ] This is about **playback** (player-app, audio, headphone controls)
- [ ] This is about **infrastructure** (deploy, storage, database)
- [ ] Not sure

## Would you be up for sending a PR?

<!-- Totally optional. Even a partial PR + questions is welcome —
happy to help finish it. -->
